user.title: OpenAI Codex — Sign in
user.description: Could not reach the OpenAI authorization server. Please retry.

progress.waiting_for_auth:
Open the following URL in your browser and sign in with your OpenAI account (ChatGPT Plus or Pro required):

[{url}]({url})

If the page asks for a code, enter:

```{code}```

This dialog will advance automatically once authorized.

error.token_exchange_failed: Could not reach the OpenAI authorisation server. Please try again.

abort.oauth_error: OpenAI returned an authentication error. Please try again.
abort.token_exchange_failed: Token exchange failed. Please try again.

abort.entry_not_loaded: Cannot add things while the configuration is disabled.

data_description.model: Choose a model first. The next page is populated with options advertised for that model.

data_description.prompt: Instruct how the model should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Select the Home Assistant API to expose to the model.
data_description.reasoning_effort: Sets reasoning.effort in the Codex request. Higher levels let the selected model spend more reasoning tokens before answering, which can improve difficult answers but increase latency and usage.
data_description.reasoning_summary: Sets reasoning.summary. None omits the summary request; Auto lets the model choose; Concise requests a short summary; Detailed requests a longer reasoning summary. This is separate from the final answer.
data_description.text_verbosity: Sets text.verbosity for the final answer: Low is concise, Medium is balanced, and High is more detailed.
data_description.service_tier: Sets the request service_tier. Standard omits the field; Fast sends priority, providing faster responses with increased usage when available for your account.
